versions.title: Fix: fix(utils): add missing detectTerminalCapabilities import

changes.title: fix: replace local file link with npm version for @mks2508/better-logger
changes.description: fix: replace local file link with npm version for @mks2508/better-logger

changes.title: Add v2 refactor plans, types, and providers
changes.description: Add v2 refactor plans, types, and providers

versions.technical_notes:
- Added commit-generator.ts with Gemini CLI integration
- Implemented commit-ui.ts with macOS/Linux native dialogs
- Created prompt-templates.ts for structured AI prompts
- Added version-manager.ts for semantic versioning
- Configured WebStorm run configurations for easy access
- Set up project structure with src/ directory organization
- Added src/providers.ts: IAIProvider interface + GeminiSdkProvider, GroqProvider,
  OpenRouterProvider, GeminiCliProvider implementations with factory and auto-detection
- Added src/project-config.ts: Config loader from .commit-wizard.json, package.json
  commitWizard key, or auto-detected from dependencies
- Refactored src/commit-generator.ts: analyzeWithGemini() -> analyzeWithAI() using
  provider abstraction, added --provider/--model/--list-providers CLI args
- Updated src/prompt-templates.ts: Dynamic config instead of hardcoded TPV_PROJECT_CONFIG,
  added components section and commitFormat instructions to prompts
- Updated src/commit-ui.ts: Pass --provider and --model args through to generator
- Added dependencies: @google/genai, groq-sdk, @openrouter/sdk
- Updated README.md and CLAUDE.md with multi-provider documentation
- Bumped version to 1.1.2
- Added VersionErrorCode to src/types/version.types.ts
- Added CommitErrorCode to src/types/commit.types.ts
- Added ReleaseErrorCode to src/types/release.types.ts
- All error codes are string union types with specific error variants
- Barrel export (types/index.ts) automatically re-exports the new types
- Removed duplicate VersionErrorCode from version.types.ts
- Removed duplicate CommitErrorCode from commit.types.ts
- Removed duplicate ReleaseErrorCode from release.types.ts
- Added VERSION_ERROR, NO_CHANGES, INVALID_VERSION to VersionErrorCode
- Added RELEASE_ERROR, GITHUB_CLI_ERROR, FILE_READ_ERROR to ReleaseErrorCode
- Canonical definitions remain in sdk.types.ts
- Changed simple-git imports to use type-only imports for types
- Added proper type imports for CommitResult, PushResult, PullResult, FetchResult, BranchSingleDeleteResult, MergeResult
- Fixed git-client.ts return types: commit(), reset(), checkout(), checkoutBranch(), deleteBranch(), merge(), push(), pull(), fetch()
- Fixed git-utils.ts return types: gitCommit(), gitPush(), gitPull(), gitFetch()
- Added missing Result import to sdk.types.ts
- Fixed formatCompactBox() to return string instead of void (was using log.box() which doesn't return)
- Removed stream: false parameter from client.chat.send call
- Added 'as any' type assertion to handle API mismatch
- Bumped version to 1.2.5
- **src/commit-generator.ts**: Se añadió la llamada `stageSpinner.succeed('Changes staged');` en la función `stageChanges` para indicar el éxito de la operación de `git add`, mejorando el feedback visual al usuario.
- **package.json**: Se actualizó la versión del proyecto de `1.2.5` a `1.2.8`. La dependencia `@mks2508/better-logger` también se actualizó de `^5.0.0` a `^5.0.2`.
- **bun.lock**: Se realizó una actualización exhaustiva de dependencias, incluyendo:
    - `@anthropic-ai/claude-code`: de `^2.1.38` a `^2.1.87`
    - `@google/genai`: de `^1.40.0` a `^1.47.0`
    - `@inquirer/prompts`: de `^7` a `^8.3.2`
    - `@mks2508/better-logger`: cambió de una referencia local `file:../advanced-logger` a `^5.0.1` (y luego a `^5.0.2` en `package.json`).
    - `@openrouter/sdk`: de `^0.3.12` a `^0.10.2`
    - `groq-sdk`: de `^0.37.0` a `^1.1.2`
    - `simple-git`: de `^3.30.0` a `^3.33.0`
